text.message: Don’t think I’m a threat at all here buddy
Dude y you stole always me?
I have to balance the game
Are you not in the lead before I settled tho?
the stealing from blue can I? Haha
Blue not wanna trade at all?
make an offer instead of saying you want wheat
I asked for you to offer anything lol
so give me options to accept or decline
I’m happy to give more but i need sheep not only wheat lol haha
nah, i dont see myself trading you lol
So you rather me trade with black and red?
i think its absurd for them to trade you also
but they can do what they want
Dude it’s a trading game lol
Worst player ever seen, you blocked me..
trading the obvious leader is not always the right move lol
especially when he makes super stingy trades
It gets black of my back
Nah I think it’s unfair to ruin peoples game
i dont understand why you guys have not blocked 6 wheat
Is that to hard to understand?
Sorry buddy I have to take it
